Reference

Worksheets

variable and variable_details worksheets

variables

variables.csv

variable_details

variable-details.csv

Derived variable functions

Functions for deriving custom CHMS variables

adjust_DBP()

Adjust diastolic blood pressure

adjust_SBP()

Adjust systolic blood pressure

calculate_GFR()

Calculate the estimated glomerular filtration rate (GFR) based on serum creatine

calculate_Hhld_Income()

Calculate adjusted total household income based on weighted household size.

calculate_WHR()

Calculate Waist-to-Height Ratio (WHR)

calculate_nonHDL()

Calculate Non-HDL Cholesterol Level

categorize_GFR_to_CKD()

Categorize Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) to Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) Stage

categorize_income()

Categorize Household Income

categorize_minperweek()

Categorize Weekly Physical Activity

categorize_nonHDL()

Non-HDL Cholesterol Categorization

cycles1to2_ace_inhibitors()

Determine if a person is taking ACE inhibitors in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

cycles1to2_any_antiHTN_meds()

Determine if a person is taking any anti-hypertensive medication in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

cycles1to2_beta_blockers()

Determine if a person is taking beta-blockers in CHMS cycles 1 to 2

cycles1to2_calcium_channel_blockers()

Determine if a person is taking calcium channel blockers in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

cycles1to2_diabetes_drugs()

Determine if a person is taking diabetes drugs in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

cycles1to2_diuretics()

Determine if a person is taking diuretics in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

cycles1to2_nsaid()

Determine if a person is taking non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAID) in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

cycles1to2_other_antiHTN_meds()

Determine if a person is taking another type of anti-hypertensive medication in CHMS cycles 1 to 2.

determine_CVD_Family_History()

Determine Cardiovascular Disease (CVD) Family History

determine_CVD_Personal_History()

Determine cardiovascular disease (CVD) personal history

determine_adjusted_hypertension()

Determine Adjusted Hypertension Status

determine_controlled_adjusted_hypertension()

Determine Controlled Adjusted Hypertension Status

determine_controlled_hypertension()

Determine Controlled Hypertension Status

determine_gooddiet()

Diet Categorization

determine_hypertension()

Determine Hypertension Status

determine_inclusive_diabetes()

Determine Inclusive Diabetes Status

find_totalFV_cycles1and2()

Calculate daily fruit and vegetable consumption in a year for respondent in CHMS cycles 1-2.

find_totalFV_cycles3to6()

Calculate daily fruit and vegetable consumption in a year for respondents in CHMS cycles 3-6.

find_week_accelerometer_average()

Calculate the average minutes of exercise per day for week-long accelerometer data.

in_lowest_income_qunitle()

Check If in Lowest Income Quintile

is_NSAID()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID).

is_ace_inhibitor()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is an ACE inhibitor.

is_any_antiHTN_med()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is any anti-hypertensive drug.

is_beta_blocker()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication belongs to the beta blocker class.

is_calcium_channel_blocker()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is a calcium channel blocker.

is_diabetes_drug()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is a diabetes drug.

is_diuretic()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is a diuretic.

is_other_antiHTN_med()

Determine if a CHMS respondent's medication is another anti-hypertensive drug.

is_taking_drug_class()

Calculate the number of occurrences of a specific drug class based on given conditions.

low_drink_score_fun()

Calculate the Low Drink Score for a CHMS Respondent Based on Alcohol Consumption

low_drink_score_fun1()

Calculate Low Drink Score According to Canada's Low-Risk Drinking Guidelines

minperday_to_minperweek()

Convert minutes per day to minutes per week.

pack_years_fun()

Pack Years Calculation for Smoking History

Synthetic CHMS data

Synthetic cycle and medication data for select CHMS cycles

cycle2

CHMS Cycle 2

cycle2_meds

CHMS Cycle 2 Medications

cycle3

CHMS Cycle 3

cycle3_meds

CHMS Cycle 3 Medications

cycle4

CHMS Cycle 4

cycle5

CHMS Cycle 5
